news.summary: Liven AS and Oma Grupp OÜ have formed a partnership to carry out a development project at Erika 6a and 6b in Põhja-Tallinn. The collaboration involves establishing a joint venture on a 50/50 basis. The project, in accordance with the detailed spatial plan and building permit, will include the construction of two six-storey residential buildings along with a nine-storey building that integrates a refurbished water tower with a new building section above it. The initiative aims to develop a total of 68 homes with a combined selling area of around 4,900 square meters.
news.headline: New development project in Põhja-Tallinn: Liven AS partners with Oma Grupp OÜ to build 68 homes spanning 4,900 m2.
Netherlands March unemployment rate: up to 3.9%

news.summary: Solana (SOL) outperformed other major cryptocurrencies as it saw a nearly 3% surge in the last 24 hours, following the successful launch of its ETF in Canada. Despite Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and XRP facing stagnation, Solana, the sixth-largest digital asset by market cap, experienced significant growth. Its trading volume skyrocketed by 32.76% to $4.37 billion, ranking it as the fifth most traded cryptocurrency within the same period. The escalating interest in Solana led to over half of Binance traders holding open contracts speculating on the coin's price increase.
news.headline: Solana outperformed Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP with a 3% spike after launching its ETF in Canada. SOL's trading volume surged 32.76% to $4.37 billion. Stakeholders show speculative rise.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, identity fraud and catfishing are growing concerns, particularly for older adults. The Federal Trade Commission reports a substantial impact, with over $3.1 billion in losses attributed to online scams and fraudulent activities in 2024. This disproportionately affects individuals aged 50 and above. SeniorMatch® is taking proactive steps by becoming the initial dating platform dedicated to singles over 50 to introduce an innovative solution to address this issue.
news.headline: SeniorMatch introduces selfie liveness verification to combat romance scams targeting older adults; $3.1 billion lost in scams in 2024.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025 in Shanghai, Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd. announced its collaboration with affiliate OneConnect Financial Technology Co., Ltd. Ping An is listed as HKEX: 2318 and SSE: 601318, while OneConnect is traded as HKEX: 6638 and NYSE: OCFT. This partnership signifies a significant development in the financial sector, combining the strengths of both entities to enhance services.
news.headline: OneConnect, a financial technology affiliate of Ping An Insurance, supports digital finance at WIC Asia-Pacific Summit.

news.summary: A healthcare acquisition and management firm, IHS, LLC, based in Georgia, proudly reveals the purchase of Atlanta Osteoarthritis Center LLC, a leading specialty clinic known for its exceptional regenerative knee care and chronic pain treatments. The acquisition marks a significant development for IHS, LLC, expanding its foothold in the healthcare industry. The transaction, completed on April 17, 2025, showcases IHS, LLC's commitment to enhancing its services and offerings.
news.headline: Georgia's IHS, LLC acquires Atlanta Osteoarthritis Center LLC to expand healthcare services in the state.

news.summary: In Wuhan, China, a recent report from Changjiang Daily delves into the characteristics that define a "Wetland City." On April 9, a video titled "Wuhan: Home to Wildlife" was unveiled, showcasing the natural residents of Wuhan and their unique tales. The video features the graceful navigation of the Finless Porpoise among other wildlife. The release of this video sheds light on the natural beauty of Wuhan and its role as a habitat for various species.
news.headline: "Wuhan, China, on April 9 released video 'Wuhan: Home to Wildlife' highlighting city's nature inhabitants. Changjiang Daily report."

news.summary: Carla Hassan, Chief Marketing Officer at JPMorgan Chase, has been promoted to the position of Vice Chair. On April 17, 2025, the Ad Council, known for using communications to drive action and address critical national issues, welcomed 17 new members to its board.
news.headline: Ad Council appoints 17 new board members, JPMorganChase CMO becomes Vice Chair. Actions aim to accelerate change.

news.summary: A recent report states that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, marking a significant drop from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The report also highlights that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations. Furthermore, the stock market has experienced a notable increase, with the main index rising by 3.5% in response to the positive economic indicators. Experts attribute this growth to several factors, including increased consumer spending and confidence, as well as expansions in key industries such as technology and healthcare. Overall, the economic outlook appears promising, with forecasts predicting continued growth in the coming months.
news.headline: 5,000 inmates released in Myanmar for Traditional New Year celebrations.

news.summary: The crypto market has experienced its weakest Q1 performance in years, with Bitcoin and Ether seeing price declines of 11.82% and 45.41% respectively. Historically, Q1 has been a strong quarter for both assets. However, Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan believes Q2 could hold promise due to factors such as global money supply expansion and US regulatory clarity. Stablecoin assets under management reached an all-time high of over $218 million in Q1. Geopolitical chaos and investor reassessment may also impact the market. Hougan predicts Bitcoin could surge approximately 138% to $200,000 by the end of the year. Coinbase remains optimistic for the second half of 2025. Bitcoin has historically moved in the direction of global M2 supply 83% of the time. This article does not provide investment advice.
news.headline: Crypto market's weak Q1 performance saw BTC down 11.82% and ETH down 45.41%. Analysts highlight catalysts for positive Q2 outlook, including global money supply expansion and US pro-regulations. Stablecoin assets hit $218M high, hinting at more growth in DeFi. Bitcoin predicted to potentially reach $200,000 by year-end.

news.summary: Fartcoin, a meme coin on the Solana blockchain, has been outperforming popular meme coins like Dogecoin and Shiba Inu. In the last 24 hours, Fartcoin surged over 4%, making it the top-performing meme coin during this period. It has also become the most bought token among smart investors, according to on-chain monitoring by Stalkchain. Fartcoin has gained significant traction, increasing by an impressive 194% over the past month amid market uncertainties due to tariffs and a general decline.
news.headline: Fartcoin surpasses Dogecoin and Shiba Inu, most bought token by 'smart money' investors, up 194% in a month.

news.summary: Taipei, April 16, 2025 - Taiwan's top B2B e-commerce platform, Taiwantrade.com, will showcase a dynamic exhibition at Taipei AMPA 2025, happening from April 23 to 26 at TaiNEX 1. Visit booth N1214 on the 4th Floor to view precision-made automotive components firsthand.
news.headline: Taiwantrade exhibiting automotive innovations at Taipei AMPA 2025 from April 23-26 at TaiNEX 1, booth N1214.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in London, a company called PHOMI launched econiclay Display (eDisplay), a cutting-edge product in the digital signage and architectural industry. This new technology aims to revolutionize how people engage with their surrounding space. The eDisplay from PHOMI is designed with advanced specifications that set it apart from traditional displays. The intricate design behind the eDisplay includes innovative features that are poised to transform the way individuals interact with digital information.
news.headline: 137th Canton Fair teaser featuring PHOMI's econiclay Display(eDisplay), revolutionizing digital signage with walls as 4K screens.

news.summary: Over the past 30 days, more than $120 million in liquidity has been transferred to Solana (SOL) from other blockchains, with $41.5 million from Ethereum (ETH) and $37.3 million from Arbitrum. This influx of liquidity indicates renewed confidence in the network. Following a scandal involving Argentina's LIBRA memecoin, Solana had seen $485 million move to other blockchains, but the recent return of liquidity coincides with double-digit price rallies for memecoins like POPCAT, FARTCOIN, BONK, and WIF. Solana has generated just under $46 million in fees for March, compared to over $400 million in fees in January 2025, with April's fees totaling around $22 million. Technically, Solana remains in a bearish trend on the 1-day chart, needing to close above $147 for a bullish trend shift. The 50-day exponential moving average is acting as strong resistance, with a bearish divergence indicating a possible correction period ahead. At $130, over 32 million SOL have been bought recently, suggesting it may serve as a strong support level. In the short term, $144 could act as resistance, $117 as the lower bound of the price range, and $129 as the key pivot zone. It is advised that readers conduct their own research for investment decisions as this article does not offer investment advice.
news.headline: Solana network sees $120M in inflows from other chains, boosting confidence. SOL price uptrend faces resistance at $140.

news.summary: A recent report by the PHBS Think Tank at Peking University HSBC Business School in Shenzhen, China, revealed positive trends in the real estate sector and overall economic growth. The Macroeconomic Analysis Report for the First Quarter of 2025 indicated a stable recovery in real estate and steady progress in the new economy. The report, released on April 17, 2025, emphasized a robust beginning to the year, with key data showing promising signs. The analysis pointed towards a healthy momentum in the market, with figures supporting the notion of sustainable development in various sectors.
news.headline: PHBS Think Tank in China releases Q1 2025 Macroeconomic Report showing stable real estate recovery and steady growth.

news.summary: Researchers have located indications of possible life on the remote exoplanet K2-18b by pinpointing an Earth-like signature in its atmosphere.
news.headline: Alien life possible on exoplanet K2-18b as scientists find Earth-like biomarker, hinting at breakthrough discovery.

news.summary: Michael Novogratz's Galaxy Ventures Fund I LP is on track to raise $175 - $180 million by the end of June, exceeding its target of $150 million. The fund focuses on crypto and blockchain startups, particularly in payments and stablecoins. Despite a challenging year for crypto VC in 2024, with $11.5 billion invested across 2,153 deals (up from $10 billion in 2023 but down from over $30 billion in 2022), Novogratz remains bullish on crypto's future. Crypto VC investments in the US dropped 22% to $1.3 billion in Q1 2025, with a pivot towards AI investments. Global crypto VC funding hit $4.8 billion in Q1 2025, the highest since Q3 2022, though a $2 billion investment in Binance from Abu Dhabi investment firm MGX comprised a significant portion. Galaxy Ventures Fund I closed its initial round at $113 million in June 2024, with a portfolio including startups like Ethena, M^Zero, Monad, Plume, and Renzo. Novogratz believes that crypto, particularly Bitcoin, is fulfilling its role as a financial steward, reflecting both a flight to safety and a long-term bet on a new financial system.
news.headline: Galaxy Ventures aims to raise $180M fund by June for 30 crypto and blockchain startups, amidst declining VC investments in US. Ventured $11.5B in 2024, down 22% to $1.3B in Q1 2025; AI sector gets 58% global venture dollars. Global crypto VC funding hit $4.8B in Q1.

news.summary: JPMorgan Asset Management has highlighted investment potential in Asian stocks focused on domestic markets, excluding export-driven sectors. The firm emphasizes this strategy in light of recent global trade tensions, and suggests that these stocks may offer more stability and growth opportunities. With an estimated average annual return of 8-10%, these domestic-oriented stocks are predicted to outperform, compared to export-focused counterparts. JPMorgan Asset Management encourages investors to consider this sector for potential high returns in the volatile market conditions.
news.headline: JPMorgan Asset Management highlights investment potential in Asian 'Domestic-Oriented' stocks..

news.summary: Coinbase's blockchain network Base created a meme token "Base is for everyone" that quickly rose to a market capitalization of $17.1 million before plummeting by nearly 90% in value to $1.9 million within 20 minutes. The token has since seen a slight recovery and was trading at $7.7 million. Coinbase distanced itself from the token, clarifying that it did not launch or sell the token and that it was automatically tokenized content on Zora. Base earned over $61,000 from the token, with a trading volume surpassing $26 million. Critics slammed Base for the token, with some expressing concerns about credibility and industry impact. Base creator defended the token, stating the aim to normalize content on-chain for creators to earn from their creativity. Another token launched by Base for an event in New York experienced a similar fate, reaching a peak value of $987,570 before dropping nearly 77% to around $230,000. The article also mentions a related discussion on Solana being "100x better" than meme coins despite a revenue plunge.
news.headline: Coinbase distances itself from memecoin that dumped $15M. Base posted token on Zora, peaked at $17.1M, dropped 90%, now $7.7M in trading.

news.summary: The founder of Ethereum Name Service warned users about a sophisticated phishing attack that impersonates Google to steal login credentials. The attack involves a fake alert claiming Google data is shared with law enforcement due to a subpoena, appearing legit and passing security checks. Victims are urged to click on a support page link hosted on Google Sites to view case materials or protest, leading to credential theft. Scammers exploit Google-owned domains and systems, sending fake emails forwarding private email addresses. Google is deploying measures to prevent such attacks, advising users to enable two-factor authentication and passkeys. The company clarified it will never ask for private account credentials. The phishing scam works by creating legitimate-looking sites under trusted Google domains, fooling DKIM signature verification. Google will shut down the attack avenue soon.
news.headline: ENS founder warns about a Google scam tricking users with a fake subpoena, utilizing Google infrastructure for phishing. Take caution!

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 3.5% this year, marking a significant increase from the 2.8% growth seen in the previous year. The growth is largely attributed to the increased consumer spending and investment in both developed and developing countries. Furthermore, the report also highlighted that the unemployment rate is expected to decrease to 4.5% worldwide, down from 5.1% in the previous year. This positive outlook has been welcomed by economists and policymakers, who believe it signals a strong recovery following the challenges faced during the pandemic.
news.headline: Indian bank shares drive market rebound despite tariff concerns; Stock indexes rise 2%, Nifty Bank rises 4%.

news.summary: An investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, has recently launched investigations into several companies for potential breaches of fiduciary duties and violations of federal securities laws. This includes Bridge Investment Group Holdings Inc. The investigations aim to assess the companies' compliance with regulations and their commitments to shareholders. The firm is analyzing financial transactions and disclosures to determine the extent of any potential wrongdoing. This move could have significant implications for shareholders and the companies under scrutiny.
news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigating BRDG, SLRN, BECN for potential violations of securities laws, fiduciary duties to shareholders.

news.headline: Investor rights firm investigates BHLB, TSVT, RDFN for securities law violations, fiduciary duty breaches on behalf of shareholders.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating NEUE, BRKL, JWN for violations, NeueHealth, Inc.'s sale included in the probe.

news.summary: According to initial results from a research conducted at the National Taiwan University Hospital, more than 50% of the cases in the sample were identified as HER2-expressing after the implementation of 3D pathology. The study was conducted by a Taiwan-based startup, JelloX Biotech Inc., and these findings suggest the potential benefits of utilizing 3D pathology techniques in diagnosing such cases. The results were revealed on April 16, 2025, highlighting the role of advancements in technology in the medical field.
news.headline: Study shows over 50% of cases reclassified as HER-2 expressing with 3D pathology. Collaboration with National Taiwan University Hospital.
